vision_report.compositional_truth_check: The registry is largely unsupported by the visual data. P1 (Yellow Pot) and P2/P4 (Black Pot) appear devoid of the specified foliage. P3 (Black Pot) contains the anchor, but the plant matter is severely diminished or absent.

plant_audit.P4: Merged with P2; no plant matter detected.

vision_report.visual_health_inference: The biome is in a state of total failure. There is no evidence of photosynthetic activity. The plants are either dead, buried, or were never established in these containers.
vision_report.anomalies: The presence of the White Rabbit anchor in an otherwise barren pot suggests a decorative setup that has lost its botanical component.
vision_report.narrative_description: The audit reveals a complete absence of the expected botanical specimens. The pots contain only soil and substrate, with the exception of the P3 anchor. The environment is currently non-viable for the listed species, likely due to total specimen loss prior to the observation window.
